title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Rajasthan Tourism - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Rajasthan Tourism - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rajasthan Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Rajasthan Tourism:
Rajasthan Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajasthan Tourism!
